headline: Jefferies downgrades Datadog after 94% YTD rally
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies cut Datadog to Hold from Buy on Tuesday, citing valuation concerns after the stock's sharp rally this year, even as the firm maintained its fundamental view of the company as an AI beneficiary.

headline: Morgan Stanley says software selloff has gone too far, names 8 winners
